'''√p-zh-g''' ('''kapazhag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnify|magnify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnify|magnify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-zh-g
|-
! Lemma
| kapazhag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thipazhag || jipazhag || shipazhag || kipazhag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthupazhag || jujupazhag || shushupazhag || kukupazhag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thupazhag || jupazhag || shupazhag || kupazhag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thupazhag || jupazhag || shupazhag || kupazhag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thepazhag || jepazhag || shepazhag || kepazhag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothopazhag || jojopazhag || shoshopazhag || kokopazhag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thopazhag || jopazhag || shopazhag || kopazhag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thopazhag || jopazhag || shopazhag || kopazhag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pazhag || pazhag || pazhag || pazhag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pazhag || pazhag || pazhag || pazhag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pazhag || pazhag || pazhag || pazhag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pazhag || pazhag || pazhag || pazhag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæpazhag || jæpazhag || shæpazhag || kæpazhag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathapazhag || jajapazhag || shashapazhag || kakapazhag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thapazhag || japazhag || shapazhag || kapazhag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thapazhag || japazhag || shapazhag || kapazhag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shapazhag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshapazhag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishapazhag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shapazhagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshapazhagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishapazhagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shapazhagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshapazhagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishapazhagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shapazhagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshapazhagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishapazhagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shapazhagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshapazhagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishapazhagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shapazhagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshapazhagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishapazhagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shapazhagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshapazhagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishapazhagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shapazhagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshapazhagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishapazhagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shapazhagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshapazhagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishapazhagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shapazhagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshapazhagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishapazhagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shapazhagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapazhagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapazhagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shapazhagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshapazhagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapazhagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shapazhagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshapazhagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishapazhagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shapazhagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapazhagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapazhagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shapazhagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshapazhagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapazhagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shapazhagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshapazhagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishapazhagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shapazhagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshapazhagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishapazhagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shapazhagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshapazhagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapazhagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shapazhagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshapazhagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishapazhagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shapazhagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshapazhagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishapazhagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shapazhagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapazhagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapazhagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
